# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment that pulls our application image from Docker Hub. Use the latest tag so we always get the newest version automatically. This is for our development environment where we want continuous updates without manual intervention.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-dev-app-deployment
  labels:
    app: my-dev-app
    environment: development
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-dev-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-dev-app
        environment: development
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-dev-app
        image: your-docker-org/your-app-image:latest # Replace with your actual Docker Hub image path
        imagePullPolicy: Always # Ensures the 'latest' image is always pulled, even if already present
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080 # Replace with the actual port your application listens on
